proofBar.freeTag: Free forever — no credit card required

ai.title: Your Full-Stack Web3 Agent
ai.description: RemixAI is embedded in every step of your workflow — generating contracts from prompts, explaining errors, auditing for security and gas optimization, providing AI connectors to other Web3 projects and much more!
ai.proNote: Contract Auditor, Gas Optimizer & live data connectors (Alchemy, Etherscan, The Graph) unlock on Pro.

quickdapp.title: From Prompt to Live dApp — Powered by RemixAI
quickdapp.description: Create a smart contract with a prompt, then describe the web app you want to build. RemixAI will generate it in seconds! From there, effortlessly deploy your application to IPFS and personalize it with a custom Remix subdomain.

features.label: Connect to a Smart Contract, Subgraph, or Circom proof
Deploy to IPFS with the Remix subdomain of your choice — Pro

pricingTeaser.title: Start Free. Scale as You Build.
pricingTeaser.description: Every plan includes the full Remix toolset. Unlock more power as your projects grow.

plans.name: Pro
plans.tagline: AI agents, cloud workspaces, and hosted dApps
features: QuickDApp Front-end Generator with Unlimited Hosting

plans.name: Starter
features: Full Access to the AI Skills Library
Bring Your Own LLM API key

goDeeper.title: Everything You Need, Built In
goDeeper.description: From your first line of Solidity to production-grade deployments, Remix has a path for every level.

cards.title: Learn Web3
cards.description: Interactive courses, AI-powered tutoring, and hands-on exercises for Solidity, Vyper, and Noir. The fastest path from zero to your first deployed contract.

cards.title: Pro Dev Tooling
cards.description: Step-through visual debugger, integrations with The Graph, Chainlink, Git, ENS, OpenZeppelin, and a contract library to accelerate every stage of development.

cards.title: Run Foundry in Remix Desktop
cards.description: Use a native terminal inside Remix Desktop to run any CLI commands like Foundry fuzz tests. You can also run The Graph CLI and Chainlink CRE commands
